page_metadata.biotools__summary: Software for estimation of expression levels of homologous genes (DNA regions) based on short reads. This is a preliminary version of code that does not call SNP variants inside the EM algorithm.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: Software for estimation of expression levels of homologous genes (DNA regions) based on short reads. This is a preliminary version of code that does not call SNP variants inside the EM algorithm.
